title: Wireless Redstone Plugin
description: Adds wireless redstone to cross long distances easily
body:
_Releasing general improvement update soon. Found some weird bugs and missing features_

### ⚡ Wireless Redstone: Lightning Rods
Tired of messy redstone trails across your base? This plugin lets you use Lightning Rods as long-range, wireless transmitters and receivers. It’s lightweight, survival-friendly, and integrates perfectly with the vanilla look of Minecraft.

### 🕹️ How to Use
Releasing video tutorial soon

**_1._ The Setup**
> Place a Lightning Rod.
>
> Place a Redstone Torch directly on top of it.

**_2._ Tuning the Frequency**
> Take a Book and Quill and rename it to either Sender or Receiver using an Anvil.
> 
> Open the book and type your desired Frequency (e.g., 100, Base_Alpha, or Gate) on the first page.
> 
> Right-click the Lightning Rod with the book to register the device.

**_3._ Transmitting Power**
> When a Sender receives power, the torch on top will light up.
>
> All Receivers on the same frequency will instantly activate, triggering a visual "strike"   > effect on the rod.

### 🌟 Key Features
- Full Variant Support: Works with all Lightning Rod stages (Normal, Exposed, Weathered, Oxidized) and even Waxed versions.
  
- Survival Integrated: No commands needed. Everything is done through blocks and items.
 
- Auto-Cleanup: If you break a rod or the torch above it, the location is automatically removed from the config—no "ghost" data left behind.

### 🛠️ Installation
- Drop the .jar into your plugins folder.

- Restart your server.

- Start linking your machines!

_Note: The Redstone Torch acts as the antenna tip and signal indicator. Use observers or adjacent redstone dust to pull the signal from your receivers._
